They will understand and gain like a huge amount of context on the organization and. They go home and they sleep and they consolidate knowledge and they develop expertise over time. LLMs don't natively do this and this is not something that has really been solved in the R&D of LLM. I think and so context windows are really like working memory and you have to program the working memory quite directly because they don't just like get smarter by by default. I think a lot of people get tripped up by the analogies in this way. In popular culture I recommend people watch these two movies Momento and 51st dates. In both of these movies, the protagonists, their weights are fixed and. Their context windows gets wiped every single morning and it's really problematic to go to work or have relationships when this happens and. This happens to all the time.
one more thing I would point to is security related limitations of the use of LLM. So for example, LLMs are quite gullible. They are susceptible to prompt injection risks. They might leak your data etc. And so and there's many other considerations security related. So, so basically long story short, you have to load your you have to load your you have to simultaneously think through this superhuman thing that has a bunch of cognitive deficits and issues.
